columns.Name: WF_MODEL_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the table. System generated.

columns.Name: WF_MODEL_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the WF Model from which this model one has been created. Foreign key to HMO_MODEL_PLANS_B table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_REQUISITION_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ID of the requisition from which this model one has been created. Foreign key to IRC_REQUISITIONS_B table.

columns.Name: PHASE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_PHASES_B table.

columns.Name: STATE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to IRC_STATES_B table.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Indicates the code of the language into which the contents of the translatable columns are translated.

columns.Name: REQUISITION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Unique readable number for the Requisition.

columns.Name: RECRUITING_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of Recruiting as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_RECRUITING_TYPE.

columns.Name: HIRING_MANAGER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the hiring manager for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the hiring manager's assignment for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the PERSON_ID of the recruiter for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_PERSONS table.

columns.Name: RECRUITER_ASSIGNMENT_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ASSIGNMENT_ID of the recruiter's assignment for this Requisition. Foreign key to PER_ALL_ASSIGNMENTS_M table.

columns.Name: JUSTIFICATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the Justification for this Requisition as a lookup code. The corresponding lookup type is ORA_IRC_REQ_JUSTIFICATION.

columns.Name: NUMBER_TO_HIRE
columns.Comments: Stores the number of people to hire for this Requisition.

columns.Name: UNLIMITED_HIRE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Stores whether this Requisition can hire unlimited number of people.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: Stores comments about this requisition.

columns.Name: GEOGRAPHY_NODE_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the Primary Location of this Requisition. Foreign key to IRC_GEO_HIER_NODES table.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores the Title for this Requisition. This is the title that is published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: MANAGER_TITLE
columns.Comments: Stores the Manager Title for this Requisition. This title is only used internally by the hiring manager, it is not meant to be published to external/internal candidates.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
